meta.notes: Curated from user-provided Equibase screenshot facts plus public horse-profile pages (Sky Sports, At The Races, IrishRacing, NYRA results). NOT an official or licensed data feed. No bulk scraping, no automated harvesting. Source URLs recorded per horse and per history row where available. Snapshot only — may go out of date between releases.

horses.name: Inspeightofcharlie
horses.watchReason: Curated profile from Equibase + public form sources. Tagg runner, NY-bred Speightster gelding.

sources.label: Equibase profile
sources.note: User-provided screenshot/browser lookup. Canonical Equibase refno 11094587.

sources.label: At The Races form
sources.note: Public form summary; some column ambiguity in historical rows.

sources.label: IrishRacing profile
sources.note: Public profile. Earnings figure here conflicts with Equibase; see caveat.

season2026.note: Includes Aqueduct May 10 2026 allowance, 2nd of 14 (Manuel Franco up). Per-race earnings ledger now estimated per purse-share method — see history rows.

alternate.label: Lifetime (Flat USA) — IrishRacing alt
alternate.note: Conflicts with Equibase career earnings ($84,430). Shown as source-specific alternate, not canonical.

history.note: Place finish at 7/2 ML. Stretched out to 1 1/16M turf for the first time. New rider Manuel Franco.
Maiden win — public profile row; column ambiguity possible, labeled as public form line.
Public form summary line, not official chart.

caveats: Curated snapshot from public data sources — not a live feed. Refreshed manually; the most recent verified race is May 10, 2026 at Aqueduct.
IrishRacing alternate lifetime earnings ($96,420) conflicts with the Equibase career total. Equibase is treated as canonical; the alternate is retained as a source-specific figure.
Career earnings on this profile include the $14,000 place share estimated for the May 10 Aqueduct allowance — official Equibase chart may round differently.

Trainer Barclay Tagg has changed riders on this horse multiple times (Espinoza → Davis → Juarez → Franco). The "Last known jockey" reflects the most recent verified ride, not necessarily the next rider booked.

Per-race earnings shown in history are ESTIMATED using the standard NA purse-share method (1st 55%, 2nd 20%, 3rd 12%, 4th 6%, 5th 3%, 6th 2%, 7th 1%, 8th 1%) applied to the race's purse. These reconcile within ~$300 of the season-2026 stated total and ~$2,200 of the 2025 stated total — the latter likely covers an unlisted 8th career start. Authoritative per-race purse shares require Equibase Race Charts (paid).
horses.equibaseRefnoNote: Equibase refno 11094587 in earlier curated builds was wrong — that ID belongs to a different (older) horse with a 35+ start career, not this 4yo NY-bred. Removed pending re-verification.
